data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All acceptance criteria met. AC1: file exists at tests/perf/ticket-list-timing.sh, executable. AC2: provisions 500 tickets (400 archived with ARCHIVED event + .archived marker, 100 active). AC3: times 3 runs, asserts median < threshold (default 2s). AC4: tests/perf/ directory created. Median on this machine: ~0.42s.
